name: Twin Pillars of Ice
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>極</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>寒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>柱</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Special Summon 2 "Ice Pillar Tokens" (Aqua/WATER/Level 4/ATK 1900/DEF 1200) in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn after this card resolves. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY; immediately after this effect resolves, Normal Summon 1 WATER monster. You can only use each effect of "Twin Pillars of Ice" once per turn.
eff: Special Summon 2 "Ice Pillar Tokens" (Aqua/WATER/Level 4/ATK 1900/DEF 1200) in Defense Position, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn after this card resolves. You can only use each effect of "Twin Pillars of Ice" once per turn.

summoning: Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
